title: parathelypteris chinensis
intro: Parathelypteris chinensis, also known as the Chinese lady fern, is a species of fern that is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Parathelypteris chinensis include reducing fever and relieving symptoms of colds and flu, as well as treating digestive issues and skin problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
